hero.headline: That *punch list* isn't going anywhere
hero.subheadline: Door won't close right? Outlet sparking? Trim gap driving you crazy? We handle the stuff that's been bugging you for months.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: From annoying to done
services_section.subheading: The little things that make your house feel like home again

services.title: Doors & Windows That Actually Work
services.description: Sticky doors, loose handles, windows that won't stay up, weatherstripping that's seen better days. We make them work like they should.

services.title: Electrical Quick Fixes
services.description: Outlets that don't work, switches doing nothing, ceiling fans wobbling like they're about to take off. Safe, code-compliant repairs.

services.title: Trim & Touch-Up Work
services.description: Gaps around baseboards, nail holes from old pictures, scuff marks that won't scrub off. Details that make rooms look finished.

services.title: Shelves, Hooks & Hardware
services.description: Mount that TV properly, hang shelves that won't sag, install towel bars that actually stay put. Done right the first time.

about.heading: Built for the stuff others skip
about.body: Most contractors want the big jobs. We're here for everything else — the punch list items, the honey-do list, the little repairs that somehow never get done. Based in Chattanooga, we show up with the right tools and get your list crossed off.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Chattanooga & surroundings
service_areas.subheading: Local handyman services throughout the greater Chattanooga area

cta.heading: Ready to check everything off?
cta.body: Send us your list — photos help. We'll give you a straight quote and get it all handled in one visit when possible.
